# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
  namespace: default
spec:
  # Apply this policy to the target workload
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  # ALLOW action - only matching requests are allowed
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    # Rule 1: Allow frontend service account to access specific API endpoints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/frontend-service-account"
            namespaces:
              - "default"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/products"
              - "/api/v1/products/*"
              - "/api/v1/orders"
              - "/api/v1/orders/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"

    # Rule 2: Allow order-processing service to access order-related endpoints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/order-processing-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "PATCH"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/orders"
              - "/api/v1/orders/*"
              - "/api/v1/inventory"
              - "/api/v1/inventory/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"

    # Rule 3: Allow monitoring service read-only access to health and metrics
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/prometheus-sa"
              - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/grafana-sa"
            namespaces:
              - "monitoring"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
            paths:
              - "/healthz"
              - "/readyz"
              - "/metrics"
            ports:
              - "8080"
              - "9090"

    # Rule 4: Allow admin service full access with JWT-based condition
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/admin/sa/admin-service-account"
            namespaces:
              - "admin"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "DELETE"
              - "PATCH"
            paths:
              - "/api/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"
      when:
        - key: request.headers[x-admin-token]
          values:
            - "valid-admin-token"

    # Rule 5: Allow internal gRPC communication between backend services
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/payment-service-sa"
              - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/notification-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "POST"
            paths:
              - "/grpc.backend.OrderService/*"
              - "/grpc.backend.PaymentService/*"
            ports:
              - "9090"
---
# Deny policy to explicitly block traffic from untrusted namespaces
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-untrusted-namespaces
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "sandbox"
              - "testing"
      to:
        - operation:
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/orders"
              - "/api/v1/orders/*"
              - "/api/v1/inventory"
              - "/api/v1/inventory/*"
            methods:
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "DELETE"
              - "PATCH"
---
# Default deny-all policy for the namespace to enforce zero-trust
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: default
spec:
  # Empty spec means deny all traffic by default
  # Only explicitly allowed traffic (via ALLOW policies above) will pass
  {}
